title: Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, or any other restricted country, you've probably encountered a major hurdle: PayPal and other popular payment processors won't let you sell digital products on their platforms. This leaves you with a critical question: how do you get paid for your ebooks, courses, tutorials, art, music, software, fonts, presets, templates, and other digital creations? You're not alone, and we have the solution for you.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's take a closer look at the alternatives: Gumroad, Payhip, and Stripe. Gumroad and Payhip allow you to create a store and sell digital products, but they both come with significant limitations. You'll need to create a buyer account, and both platforms have strict policies and requirements. Stripe, on the other hand, is a payment processor that's widely available, but it's still subject to the same country restrictions as PayPal. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that offers a seamless, automated solution for selling digital products, regardless of your location or the buyer's location. With NOWPayments, you can create a store, set prices, and start selling without any hassle or restrictions.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad and Payhip block buyers from certain countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Stripe also restricts payments to these countries, making it difficult for digital creators to get paid. In contrast, NOWPayments uses blockchain technology to facilitate transactions, bypassing traditional payment processor restrictions. This means you can sell digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about country-specific limitations or restrictions. With NOWPayments, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products, without the hassle of dealing with blocked countries or payment processors.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for transactions, and their payment speeds can be slow. Gumroad and Payhip also charge fees, although they're generally lower than those of PayPal and Stripe. NOWPayments, on the other hand, charges a flat fee of 0.5% per transaction, and payments are processed in real-time, ensuring that you get paid quickly and efficiently. With NOWPayments, you can keep more of your hard-earned money and focus on growing your digital product business.
Traditional payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad are designed to restrict payments to certain countries, limiting your ability to get paid for your digital products.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad and Payhip require manual intervention for delivery and payment processing. Stripe offers some automation features, but they're still limited. NOWPayments, however, offers advanced automation capabilities, including automated delivery and payment verification. With NOWPayments, you can set up your store, and the platform will handle everything else, from payment processing to delivery, ensuring that your buyers receive their digital products quickly and smoothly.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're looking for a seamless, automated solution for selling digital products, regardless of your location or the buyer's location, NOWPayments is the clear winner. With its flat fee, real-time payment processing, and advanced automation capabilities, NOWPayments is the perfect choice for digital creators who want to focus on creating and selling their products, without worrying about payment processor restrictions or fees.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments is a crypto-native payment processor that uses blockchain technology to facilitate transactions, bypassing traditional payment processor restrictions.
